{{Quote|You better leave before you get hurt.|Uwo Poal|<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>}}
'''Uwo Poal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for [[Morkov]] in [[Dee'ja Peak/Legends|Dee'ja Peak]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Morkov sent an individual to him to pick up five crates of [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]], but he attacked them along with his bodyguards. The individual managed to kill both Uwo and his bodyguards, however, before they returned to [[Mort]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
